title: The Database System Environment
description: A flowchart illustrating the components of a DBMS environment and their interactions, showing how users and applications interact with the database through the DBMS.
relationships: End Users and Application Programs interact with the DBMS
Application Programmers create programs that use the DBMS
DBA manages and maintains the DBMS and Database
DBMS Software accesses and manipulates the Database
DBMS Software uses the Meta-data/Dictionary to understand the database structure
